creator: i.palsenberg@jdi.nl
text:
I've reconfigured to use a serial console, and not dump me in a debugger
prompt on a panic.

I've uploaded the serial console output and /var/crash/core.txt.0 file
to a public server.

Serial output :
http://www.palsenberg.com/fbsd-devel/fbsd-devel-serial.txt

/var/crash file : 
http://www.palsenberg.com/fbsd-devel/core.0.txt

If anyone needs more info, of if I need to test something : let me know.


Regards,


	Igmar
